discover.translation: 發現 ( [動] 暴露、查出、發現、檢測 )

discover.sentence_zh: 轉過街角，我發現了一家可愛的小商店。我發現他們賣小部件。

draw.translation: 畫 ( [動] 拔、拔出、杓、掣；[名] 不分勝負、和局、平局、拖曳 )

earn.sentence_zh: 你可以吃 s'mores：你贏得了它們，你把人行道上的積雪清理得很好。

education.sentence_en: 2016-06-17 AROP JOSEPH "Education is the slight hammer that breaks the yoke of ignorance, and moulds knowledge, skills, ideas, good moral values in a person be it a child, a youth or full grown adult. no matter a persons age learning never stops".
education.sentence_zh: 2016-06-17 AROP JOSEPH 「教育是一把輕錘，它打破無知的枷鎖，塑造一個人的知識、技能、思想和良好的道德價值觀，無論是兒童、青年還是成年成人。無論一個人的年齡，學習永遠不會停止」。

favor.sentence_zh: 他花時間開車送我回家，這是幫了我一個忙。

female.translation: 女性 ( [形] 雌、女的；[名] 雌性、母、女、女性 )

happy.translation: 快樂的 ( [形] 邴、暢、高興、哿 )

product.translation: 產品 ( [名] 產量、產品、產物、乘積 )
product.sentence_en: That store offers a variety of products.  We've got to sell a lot of product by the end of the month.
product.sentence_zh: 那家商店提供各種產品。  我們必須在月底前賣出很多產品。

profit.translation: 利潤 ( [動] 裨、獲益、受用、嬴；[名] 裨補、裨益、成果、得益 )
profit.sentence_en: Reading such an enlightening book on the subject was of much profit to his studies.
profit.sentence_zh: 閱讀這樣一本關於該主題的啟發性書籍對他的學習大有裨益。

program.translation: 程式 ( [動] 編程；[名] 程序、方案、規劃、計劃 )
program.sentence_en: Our program for today’s exercise class includes swimming and jogging.
program.sentence_zh: 我們今天的運動課程包括游泳和慢跑。

progress.translation: 進步 ( [動] 促進、進展、演變、籀；[名] 昌、昌盛、發達、發展 )
progress.sentence_en: Testing for the new antidote is currently in progress.
progress.sentence_zh: 新解毒劑的測試目前正在進行中。

project.translation: 專案 ( [動] 表達、發射、放映、計劃；[名] 工程、計劃、項目 )
project.sentence_en: Projects like Pruitt-Igoe were considered irreparably dangerous and demolished.
project.sentence_zh: 像 Pruitt-Igoe 這樣的項目被認為具有不可挽回的危險而被拆除。

promise.translation: 承諾 ( [名] 承諾、諾言、誓言、約言；[動] 承諾、答應、發誓、諾 )
promise.sentence_en: if I make a promise, I always stick to it;  he broke his promise
promise.sentence_zh: 如果我做出了承諾，我就一定會遵守；  他違背了他的諾言

proper.translation: 恰當的 ( [形] 當、得、得當、得宜 )

protect.translation: 保護 ( [動] 保、保護、保衛、保佑 )
protect.sentence_en: Condoms are designed to protect against sexually-transmitted diseases.
protect.sentence_zh: 避孕套旨在預防性傳染病。

prove.translation: 證明 ( [動] 驗、徵、證、証明 )
prove.sentence_en: I will prove that my method is more effective than yours.
prove.sentence_zh: 我會證明我的方法比你的方法更有效。

provide.translation: 提供 ( [動] 備、發放、發給、供 )
provide.sentence_en: It is difficult to provide for my family working on minimum wage.
provide.sentence_zh: 我靠最低工資工作很難養家。

public.translation: 民眾 ( [名] 大眾、公家、公用、公眾；[形] 公、公共、公開、公眾 )
public.sentence_en: Members of the public may not proceed beyond this point.

publish.translation: 發布 ( [動] 頒佈、編印、佈、出版 )
publish.sentence_en: Most of the sketches Faulkner published in 1925 appeared in the Sunday magazine section of the New Orleans Times-Picayune.
publish.sentence_zh: 福克納 1925 年發表的大部分草圖都出現在《新奧爾良時報-皮卡尤恩》的星期日雜誌版塊上。

punish.translation: 懲治 ( [動] 辦罪、懲、懲辦、懲處 )
punish.sentence_en: If a prince violates the law, then he must be punished like an ordinary person.
punish.sentence_zh: 如果王子觸犯了法律，那麼他就必須像普通人一樣受到懲罰。

purpose.translation: 目的 ( [名] 目的、意、意向、用意；[動] 意欲 )
purpose.sentence_en: The purpose of turning off the lights overnight is to save energy.
purpose.sentence_zh: 晚上關燈的目的是為了節省能源。

push.translation: 推 ( [動] 按、扒、撥、促進；[名] 奮力 )
push.sentence_en: Give the door a hard push if it sticks.
push.sentence_zh: 如果門卡住了，用力推一下。

quality.translation: 品質 ( [名] 成色、品、品質、色；[形] 最高品質的 )
quality.sentence_en: Quality of life is usually determined by health, education, and income.
quality.sentence_zh: 生活品質通常由健康、教育和收入決定。

quarter.translation: 四分之一 ( [名] 刻；[動] 四等分、屯、駐防、駐守 )
quarter.sentence_en: Quarter the horses in the third stable.
quarter.sentence_zh: 將第三個馬厩中的馬匹分成四份。

question.translation: 問題 ( [動] 查問、靠問、刨、審問；[名] 懷疑、課題、問題、疑問 )

quick.translation: 快的 ( [形] 鬼、疾、捷、快；[名] 活人；[副] 快 )

quickly.translation: 迅速地 ( [副] 遄、趕快、赶忙、很快 )
quickly.sentence_en: If we go this way, we'll get there quickly.
quickly.sentence_zh: 如果我們沿著這條路走，我們很快就能到達那裡。

quiet.translation: 安靜的 ( [形] 安、安定、安靜、安生；[名] 和平、謐、肅靜；[動] 靖、舒懷、尉 )
quiet.sentence_en: There was a strange quiet in the normally very lively plaza.
quiet.sentence_zh: 原本熱鬧非凡的廣場，出現了一絲詭異的安靜。

quite.translation: 相當 ( [副] 比較、的確、夠、好生 )

race.translation: 種族 ( [動] 馳逐、賽跑；[名] 競賽、賽馬、樹種、種 )
race.sentence_en: The race around the park was won by Johnny, who ran faster than the others.
race.sentence_zh: 約翰尼贏得了圍繞公園的比賽，他跑得比其他人都快。

raise.translation: 增加 ( [名] 昂、拔、豐富、騫；[動] 昂、撫養、喚起、舉 )
raise.sentence_en: The boss gave me a raise.

rapid.translation: 迅速的 ( [名] 激流、湍；[形] 急、急促、急劇、急遽 )

rate.translation: 速度 ( [名] 比率、等級、費、費用；[動] 估價 )
rate.sentence_en: At the height of his powers, he was producing pictures at the rate of four a year.
rate.sentence_zh: 在他的巔峰時期，他以每年四張的速度製作影片。

rather.translation: 相當 ( [副] 比較、夠、幾分、較 )
rather.sentence_en: I'd like this one rather than the other one.
rather.sentence_zh: 我想要這個而不是另一個。

reach.translation: 抵達 ( [動] 徂、達、達到、逮；[名] 範圍、河段、延伸、游 )
reach.sentence_en: The fruit is beyond my reach.

reader.sentence_en: an early reader, a talented reader
reader.sentence_zh: 早期讀者，有才華的讀者

ready.translation: 準備好 ( [動] 辦、備、打點、謖；[形] 得、將、熟、停當；[名] 現金、現款 )
ready.sentence_en: The porridge is ready to serve.

realize.translation: 意識到 ( [動] 辦到、酬、覺悟、看清 )
realize.sentence_en: The objectives of the project were never fully realized.
realize.sentence_zh: 該項目的目標從未完全實現。

reason.translation: 原因 ( [名] 常情、道理、故、合理；[動] 合理、意、臆斷 )
reason.sentence_en: Mankind should develop reason above all other virtues.
reason.sentence_zh: 人類應該發展理性高於所有其他美德。

receive.translation: 收到 ( [動] 承、承受、吃、得到 )
receive.sentence_en: She received many presents for her birthday.
receive.sentence_zh: 她生日時收到了很多禮物。

recently.translation: 最近 ( [副] 近來、近日、新、新近 )

recognize.translation: 認出 ( [動] 辨、辨認、承認、認 )

record.translation: 記錄 ( [形] 創紀錄的；[動] 登、記、記錄、記載；[名] 案、案卷、筆錄、簿籍 )
record.sentence_en: The person had a record of the interview so she could review her notes.
record.sentence_zh: 該人有採訪記錄，以便她可以查看她的筆記。

recording.translation: 記錄 ( [名] 記錄、錄音；[形] 記錄的 )
recording.sentence_en: I wanted to record every detail of what happened, for the benefit of future generations.
recording.sentence_zh: 我想記錄下發生的每一個細節，造福子孫後代。

recover.translation: 恢復 ( [動] 重獲、瘳、復、復原 )
recover.sentence_en: After days of inquiries, he finally recovered his lost wallet.
recover.sentence_zh: 經過幾天的詢問，他終於找回了遺失的錢包。

reduce.translation: 減少 ( [動] 貶、裁、裁減、掉 )
reduce.sentence_en: to reduce weight, speed, heat, expenses, price, personnel etc.
reduce.sentence_zh: 減少重量、速度、熱量、費用、價格、人員等。

refuse.translation: 拒絕 ( [動] 拒、拒絕、抗、卻；[名] 廢物、廢墟、穢土、垃圾 )

regard.translation: 看待 ( [動] 寶貴、寶重、當、當成；[名] 詳情、注意 )
regard.sentence_en: He is held in great regard in Whitehall.
regard.sentence_zh: 他在白廳受到高度尊重。

region.translation: 地區 ( [名] 帶、地區、地域、方 )

regular.translation: 常規的 ( [形] 班、定期、端、端正 )
regular.sentence_en: Bartenders usually know their regulars by name.
regular.sentence_zh: 調酒師通常都知道常客的名字。

relation.translation: 關係 ( [名] 關聯、關係、聯繫、係 )
relation.sentence_en: The relation between diet and health is complex.
relation.sentence_zh: 飲食與健康之間的關係很複雜。

relative.translation: 相對的 ( [名] 關系詞、戚、親、親戚；[形] 相對的 )
relative.sentence_en: Why do my relatives always talk about sex?
relative.sentence_zh: 為什麼我的親戚總是談論性？

remind.translation: 提醒 ( [動] 提醒、想起、憶 )

remove.translation: 消除 ( [動] 拔除、搬、搬家、搬遷；[名] 升級 )
remove.sentence_en: He removed the marbles from the bag.

repair.translation: 維修 ( [動] 補、葺、繕、收拾；[名] 脩理 )
repair.sentence_en: I took the car to the workshop for repair.
repair.sentence_zh: 我把車開到修理廠修理。

repeat.translation: 重複 ( [動] 背誦、重、重蹈、重複；[名] 重複 )
repeat.sentence_en: We gave up after the third repeat because it got boring.
repeat.sentence_zh: 第三次重複後我們放棄了，因為它變得無聊。

replace.translation: 代替 ( [動] 撤換、代、代替、倒換 )
replace.sentence_en: When you've finished using the telephone, please replace the handset.
replace.sentence_zh: 使用完電話後，請放回聽筒。

reply.translation: 回覆 ( [動] 報、酬對、答應、答；[名] 答詞、反應、回答、回話 )
reply.sentence_en: Joanne replied to Pete's insult with a slap to his face.
reply.sentence_zh: 喬安妮用一巴掌回應了皮特的侮辱。

report.translation: 報告 ( [名] 報、調查報告、彙報；[動] 報、報告、呈報、反映 )
report.sentence_en: A report by the telecommunications ministry on the phone network revealed a severe capacity problem.
report.sentence_zh: 電信部關於電話網路的一份報告揭示了嚴重的容量問題。

require.translation: 要求 ( [動] 命令、需、需求、要求 )

research.translation: 研究 ( [動] 查、查考、從事研究、考證；[名] 考證、研究 )
research.sentence_en: The research station that houses Wang and his team is outside Lijiang, a city of about 1.2 million people.
research.sentence_zh: 王和他的團隊所在的研究站位於麗江郊外，這座城市約有 120 萬人口。

respect.translation: 尊重 ( [動] 褒、崇敬、關心、關於；[名] 處、方面、尊敬 )
respect.sentence_en: He is an intellectual giant, and I have great respect for him.
respect.sentence_zh: 他是一位知識巨人，我非常尊敬他。

rest.translation: 休息 ( [動] 安息、放、放心、將息；[名] 棲息、其余、息、休息 )
rest.sentence_en: I need to get a good rest tonight; I was up late last night.
rest.sentence_zh: 今晚我需要好好休息；昨晚我睡得很晚。

return.translation: 返回 ( [動] 重返、重回、酬、答；[名] 歸還、回來 )
return.sentence_en: I expect the house to be spotless upon my return.
return.sentence_zh: 我希望我回來時房子一塵不染。

review.translation: 審查 ( [動] 復審、復習、回顧、檢閱；[名] 評論、述評、閱、閱兵 )
review.sentence_en: I need to make a review of the book before I can understand it.
review.sentence_zh: 我需要先回顧一下這本書，然後才能理解它。

rise.translation: 上升 ( [名] 發達、發展、豐富、昇；[動] 飛揚、復活、隮、起 )

risk.translation: 風險 ( [動] 擔險、冒 ... 之險、冒險、拚；[名] 風險、冒、冒號、冒險 )
risk.sentence_en: 2006, Trever Ramsey on BBC News website, Exercise 'cuts skin cancer risk' read at http//news.bbc.co.uk/1/hi/health/4764535.stm on 14 May 2006
risk.sentence_zh: 2006 年，特雷弗·拉姆齊 (Trever Ramsey) 在 BBC 新聞網站上發表了運動「降低皮膚癌風險」的文章，網址為：http://news.bbc.co.uk/1/hi/health/4764535.stm，2006 年 5 月 14 日

run.translation: 跑步 ( [形] 澆鑄的、熔化的；[動] 辦、奔跑、奔走、顛；[名] 路程、跑步 )
run.sentence_en: I just got back from my morning run.

rush.translation: 匆忙 ( [動] 奔、衝、闖、促；[名] 燈心草、莞、蒯、茢 )

sale.translation: 銷售 ( [名] 大賤賣、賣、拍賣、銷路 )

satisfy.translation: 滿足 ( [動] 飽、合意、滿足、遂 )
satisfy.sentence_en: I'm not satisfied with the quality of the food here.
satisfy.sentence_zh: 我對這裡的食物品質不滿意。

save.translation: 節省 ( [動] 保持、保存、保留、儲；[介] 除了、除了 ... 以外、而且、加之；[連] 而且、加之、要不是 )
save.sentence_en: The goaltender made a great save.
save.sentence_zh: 守門員做出了一次精彩的撲救。

search.translation: 搜尋 ( [動] 查、抄身、監工、搜；[名] 搜、搜查、搜身、廋疏 )
search.sentence_en: With only five minutes until we were meant to leave, the search for the keys started in earnest.
search.sentence_zh: 距離我們離開還有五分鐘，尋找鑰匙的工作就正式開始了。

secret.translation: 秘密 ( [形] 暗、奧妙、保密、地下；[名] 分泌、祕、祕決 )
secret.sentence_en: "Can you keep a secret?" "Yes." "So can I."
secret.sentence_zh: “你能保守秘密嗎？” “是的。” “我也可以。”

seem.translation: 似乎 ( [動] 仿佛、倣佛、見得、覺得 )
seem.sentence_en: He seems to be ill.   Her eyes seem blue.   It seems like it is going to rain later.   How did she seem to you?
seem.sentence_zh: 他好像病了。   她的眼睛看起來是藍色的。   看來稍後要下雨了。   你覺得她怎麼樣？

seldom.translation: 很少 ( [副] 不常、很少、難得 )
seldom.sentence_zh: 他們現在很少來這裡了。

sense.translation: 感覺 ( [名] 常情、道理、感、感官；[動] 感、感到、覺、覺察 )

separately.translation: 分別地 ( [副] 分別、個別地、另 )
separately.sentence_en: We've been living separately for three years.

serious.translation: 嚴肅的 ( [形] 岸然、沉重、篤、認真 )
serious.sentence_en: It was a surprise to see the captain, who had always seemed so serious, laugh so heartily.
serious.sentence_zh: 看到一向嚴肅的船長笑得這麼開心，真是讓人驚訝。

serve.translation: 服務 ( [動] 幫、幫扶、幫助、對待 )

service.translation: 服務 ( [形] 兵的、軍事的；[名] 服侍、服務、服役、功；[動] 服務、維修、招待 )
service.sentence_en: I say I did him a service by ending our relationship – now he can freely pursue his career.
service.sentence_zh: 我說我結束了我們的關係，幫了他一個忙──現在他可以自由地追求他的事業了。

several.translation: 一些 ( [形] 個別的、好幾、幾、幾個 )

share.translation: 分享 ( [名] 部分、分、份、股；[動] 分享、共、共享 )
share.sentence_en: Upload media from the browser or directly to the file share.
share.sentence_zh: 從瀏覽器上傳媒體或直接上傳到檔案共用。

should.translation: 應該 ( [auxiliary verb] 當、該、理應、宜 )
should.sentence_en: I hope that we shall win the game.
should.sentence_zh: 我希望我們能贏得比賽。

shut.translation: 關閉 ( [動] 閉、閼、關、關閉；[形] 關閉的、合攏的 )

sickness.translation: 疾病 ( [名] 病、疾、疾病、瘼 )

side.translation: 邊 ( [名] 半邊、幫、幫派、邊；[動] 側；[形] 耳 )

sign.translation: 符號 ( [名] 標、摽、標記、標誌；[動] 記名、簽、簽署、簽字 )
sign.sentence_en: I gave them a thumbs-up sign.
sign.sentence_zh: 我向他們豎起了大拇指。

signal.translation: 訊號 ( [名] 暗號、示意、手勢、信號；[動] 摽、發信號、示意 )
signal.sentence_en: My mobile phone can't get a signal in the railway station.
signal.sentence_zh: 我的手機在火車站收不到訊號。

similar.translation: 相似的 ( [形] 差不多、雷同、類、類似 )

sincerely.translation: 真摯地 ( [副] 誠摯、謹、懇、攄誠 )
sincerely.sentence_en: I sincerely hope they make it home safely.
sincerely.sentence_zh: 我衷心希望他們能夠平安回家。

single.translation: 單身的 ( [形] 單、單個、單身、單一；[名] 獨身者、獨身主義者 )
single.sentence_en: The Offspring released four singles from their most recent album.
single.sentence_zh: The Offspring 發行了他們最新專輯中的四首單曲。

skill.translation: 技能 ( [名] 把式、本領、本事、工 )

solve.translation: 解決 ( [動] 解、解決、解釋、繹 )

sort.translation: 種類 ( [名] 般、等、分類、類；[動] 捃、類 )
sort.sentence_en: I had a sort of my cupboard.
sort.sentence_zh: 我有一個類似我的櫥櫃的東西。

sound.translation: 聲音 ( [動] 創立、發出聲音、籟、唎；[名] 嚆、籟、唎、鳴；[形] 合理的、健康、健全、甜 )

source.translation: 來源 ( [名] 本、本源、策源地、根源 )
source.sentence_en: The accused refused to reveal the source of the illegal drugs she was selling.
source.sentence_zh: 被告拒絕透露她所銷售的非法毒品的來源。

special.translation: 特別的 ( [形] 附加的、精干、殊、特殊 )
special.sentence_en: We're running a special on turkey for Thanksgiving.
special.sentence_zh: 我們正在為感恩節舉辦一場關於火雞的特別活動。

speech.translation: 演講 ( [名] 報告、詞、發表、發言 )
speech.sentence_en: It was hard to hear the sounds of his speech over the noise. He had a bad speech impediment.
speech.sentence_zh: 在喧鬧聲中很難聽清他的講話聲。他有嚴重的言語障礙。

speed.translation: 速度 ( [動] 奔馳、馳、馳鶩、馳行；[名] 馳、快、快慢、速 )
speed.sentence_en: How does Usain Bolt run at that speed?
speed.sentence_zh: 尤塞恩·博爾特如何跑得這麼快？

spend.translation: 花費 ( [動] 度、費、耗、耗費 )
spend.sentence_en: I’m sorry, boss, but the advertising spend exceeded the budget again this month.
spend.sentence_zh: 對不起，老闆，這個月的廣告支出又超出預算了。

square.translation: 方塊 ( [副] 筆直、一直；[形] 方、平方；[名] 廣場、矩、平方、正方形；[動] 使 ... 自乘 )

stand.translation: 站立 ( [名] 貨攤、架、旗幟、台；[動] 經、經受、立、忍受 )
stand.sentence_en: The Commander says we will make our stand here.
stand.sentence_zh: 指揮官說我們會堅守在這裡。

state.translation: 狀態 ( [名] 邦、公家、國、國度；[動] 表示、陳、陳述、陳說；[形] 國家的、國立的、國營的、國有的 )
state.sentence_en: He stated that he was willing to help.

enterprise.sentence_zh: 微型企業被定義為擁有 5 名或更少員工且原始資本較低的企業。

fake.translation: 偽造的 ( [動] 假、偽、偽造、偽裝；[形] 冒充的、虛、虛假、虛設；[名] 冒牌者 )

fasten.sentence_zh: 你能用釘子把這些木板固定在一起嗎？

faulty.translation: 有缺陷的 ( [形] 敗、不對的、不完善的、不正確的 )

faulty.sentence_zh: 我認為你不能從前提推論出這一點。這是一個錯誤的論點。

feast.sentence_zh: 我們舉辦了一場盛宴來慶祝豐收。

feature.translation: 特徵 ( [名] 點、面目、特點、特性；[動] 放映 )

finance.translation: 金融 ( [名] 財政、金錢、金融 )

finance.sentence_zh: 誰真正負責民主國家的財政？

concentrate.sentence_zh: 將光線集中到一個焦點

concise.translation: 簡潔的 ( [形] 簡洁、簡練、簡明、簡要 )

conclude.translation: 得出結論 ( [動] 辦到、畢、閉幕、締 )
conclude.sentence_en: The story concluded with a moral.
conclude.sentence_zh: 這個故事以一個寓意結束。

condition.translation: 狀態 ( [名] 地步、光景、候、環境；[動] 肥育、教練、決定、訓練 )
condition.sentence_en: Environmental protection is a condition for sustainability.   What other planets might have the right conditions for life?   The union had a dispute over sick time and other conditions of employment.
condition.sentence_zh: 環境保護是永續發展的條件。   還有哪些行星可能具備適合生命存在的條件？   工會在病假和其他就業條件方面有爭議。

confirm.translation: 確認 ( [動] 肯定、確認、驗、證 )

conflict.translation: 衝突 ( [名] 衝突、抵觸、摩擦、意見不合；[動] 衝突、抵觸、頂撞、摩擦 )
conflict.sentence_en: The conflict between the government and the rebels began three years ago.
conflict.sentence_zh: 政府與叛軍之間的衝突始於三年前。

confuse.translation: 迷惑 ( [動] 搞亂、隳刺、混、慁 )

consist.sentence_en: The greeting package consists of some brochures, a pen, and a notepad.
consist.sentence_zh: 問候語包裡有一些小冊子、一支筆和一本記事本。

consistent.translation: 持續的 ( [形] 蒹容、接氣、連貫、如一 )
consistent.sentence_en: He is very consistent in his political choices: economy good or bad, he always votes Labour!
consistent.sentence_zh: 他的政治選擇非常一致：經濟好壞，他總是投票給工黨！

construct.translation: 構造 ( [名] 想出、意象；[動] 構、構造、建、建設 )
construct.sentence_en: Loops and conditional statements are constructs in computer programming.
construct.sentence_zh: 循環和條件語句是電腦程式設計中的構造。

construction.translation: 建造 ( [名] 構造、建立、結構、解釋 )
construction.sentence_en: Construction is underway on the new bridge.
construction.sentence_zh: 新橋的施工正在進行中。

consume.translation: 消耗 ( [動] 耗、耗費、耗損、殲 )
consume.sentence_en: The power plant consumes 30 tons of coal per hour.
consume.sentence_zh: 該發電廠每小時消耗30噸煤。

contain.translation: 包含 ( [動] 包藏、包含、遏制、含 )
contain.sentence_en: I'm so excited, I can hardly contain myself!
contain.sentence_zh: 我太興奮了，簡直無法自抑！

content.translation: 內容 ( [形] 安、滿意的、懌、逌；[名] 含量、滿足、內容、容度；[動] 滿足、邃 )
content.sentence_en: You can't have any more - you'll have to content yourself with what you already have.
content.sentence_zh: 你不能再擁有更多了——你必須滿足於你已經擁有的。

contest.translation: 競賽 ( [動] 鬥、競、論爭、攖；[名] 比賽、競賽、論爭、賽 )

contrary.translation: 相反 ( [形] 對立的、和 ... 不同、逆、拗 )

contribute.translation: 貢獻 ( [動] 貢獻、合作、建樹、繳納 )
contribute.sentence_en: to contribute articles to a journal

convey.translation: 傳達 ( [動] 表達、傳、傳達、傳送 )
convey.sentence_en: Air conveys sound. Water is conveyed through the pipe.
convey.sentence_zh: 空氣傳遞聲音。水透過管道輸送。

convince.translation: 說服 ( [動] 使信服、說、說服、信服 )
convince.sentence_en: I wouldn't have or do something, unless I'm convinced that it's good.
convince.sentence_zh: 我不會做某事，除非我確信它是好的。

corporate.translation: 公司的 ( [形] 法人的、社團的 )
corporate.sentence_en: McDonald's corporate issued a new policy today.
corporate.sentence_zh: 麥當勞公司今天發布了一項新政策。

council.translation: 理事會 ( [名] 評議會、政務會 )

courtesy.translation: 禮貌 ( [名] 和藹、款曲、禮、禮節 )
courtesy.sentence_en: He was always known for his grace, kindness, and courtesy to people of every rank.
courtesy.sentence_zh: 他總是以他對各個階層的人的優雅、善良和禮貌而聞名。

coverage.translation: 覆蓋範圍 ( [名] 復蓋、所包括的范圍 )
coverage.sentence_en: Before laying sod on that clay, the ground needs two inches of coverage with topsoil.
coverage.sentence_zh: 在黏土上鋪草皮之前，地面需要覆蓋兩英吋的表土。

craft.translation: 工藝 ( [名] 船隻、工、詭計、航 )

crash.translation: 碰撞 ( [形] 緊急；[名] 欻、轟隆聲、摔傷、意外；[副] 轟隆聲地；[動] 禍、摔壞、摔傷 )
crash.sentence_en: After the lightning came the crash of thunder.
crash.sentence_zh: 閃電過後，便是雷霆轟鳴。

crazy.translation: 瘋狂的 ( [名] 癡迷、發瘋；[形] 癡迷的、癲、瘨、發瘋的 )
crazy.sentence_en: His ideas were both frightening and crazy.
crazy.sentence_zh: 他的想法既可怕又瘋狂。

creative.translation: 有創造力的 ( [名] 創作者；[形] 創作的 )
creative.sentence_zh: 他是一位富有遠見的創意人士。

creativity.translation: 創造力 ( [名] 創造力、創造性 )
creativity.sentence_en: His creativity is unsurpassed by his fellow students in the art class.
creativity.sentence_zh: 他的創造力是美術課上的同學無法比擬的。

creature.sentence_en: He's a creature of habit.   insects and other creatures
creature.sentence_zh: 他是個有習慣的人。   昆蟲和其他生物

credit.translation: 信用 ( [名] 貸款、信任、信用、信譽；[動] 歸功於、信用 )
credit.sentence_en: He arrived five minutes late, but to his credit he did work an extra ten minutes at the end of his shift.
credit.sentence_zh: 他遲到了五分鐘，但值得讚揚的是，他在輪班結束時確實多工作了十分鐘。

crowded.sentence_en: The man crowded into the packed room.
crowded.sentence_zh: 男人擠進了擁擠的房間。

current.translation: 目前的 ( [形] 本屆、當今、當前、活期；[名] 潮流、霤、趨勢 )
current.sentence_en: current events;  current leaders;  current negotiations
current.sentence_zh: 時事;  現任領導；  目前的談判

database.translation: 資料庫 ( [名] 數據庫、資料庫 )
database.sentence_en: I have a database of all my contacts in my personal organizer.
database.sentence_zh: 我的個人記事本中有一個包含所有聯絡人的資料庫。

dealer.translation: 經銷商 ( [名] 發牌者、販、販子、交易者 )
dealer.sentence_en: That used car dealer gave me a great deal on my 1962 rusted-out Volkswagen bug!
dealer.sentence_zh: 那個二手車經銷商給了我一個很大的優惠，賣掉了我那輛 1962 年生鏽的大眾汽車！

deceive.translation: 欺騙 ( [動] 詿、糊弄、誆、誑 )

declaration.translation: 宣言 ( [名] 榜、榜文、報單、報關表 )

decline.translation: 衰退 ( [動] 敗落、辭卻、減弱、拒絕；[名] 還原、拒絕、落、頹 )
decline.sentence_en: The dollar has declined rapidly since 2001.
decline.sentence_zh: 自2001年以來，美元迅速貶值。

descent.translation: 血統 ( [名] 降落、降下、侵襲 )
descent.sentence_en: We climbed the mountain with difficulty, but the descent was easier.
descent.sentence_zh: 我們爬山很困難，但下山就輕鬆多了。

decrease.translation: 減少 ( [動] 減、減少、損、縮小；[名] 還原、減少 )
decrease.sentence_en: One research team has recorded Baishui’s decrease at about 27 meters per year over the last 10 years.
decrease.sentence_zh: 一個研究小組記錄，在過去 10 年裡，白水的水位每年下降約 27 公尺。

deduct.sentence_en: I will deduct the cost of the can of peas from the money I owe you.
deduct.sentence_zh: 我將從欠你的錢中扣除豌豆罐頭的費用。

delegate.translation: 代表 ( [動] 發、委派 ... 為代表；[名] 代表、襄理 )

delivery.translation: 送貨 ( [名] 發出、發行、交貨、娩 )
delivery.sentence_en: The delivery was completed by four.

demolish.translation: 拆除 ( [動] 爆破、殘、拆、拆除 )
demolish.sentence_en: They demolished the old mill and put up four townhouses.
demolish.sentence_zh: 他們拆除了舊磨坊，蓋了四棟連棟別墅。

demonstrate.translation: 證明 ( [動] 表明、表演、論証、示範 )
demonstrate.sentence_en: Can you demonstrate the new tools for us?
demonstrate.sentence_zh: 您能為我們示範一下新工具嗎？

demonstration.translation: 示範 ( [名] 表明、操演、示範、遊行 )
demonstration.sentence_en: I have to give a demonstration to the class tomorrow, and I'm ill-prepared.
demonstration.sentence_zh: 明天我必須給全班做演示，而我準備不足。

denounce.translation: 聲討 ( [動] 貶斥、駁斥、斥責、鬥 )
denounce.sentence_en: to denounce someone as a swindler, or as a coward
denounce.sentence_zh: 譴責某人是騙子或膽小鬼

deposit.translation: 訂金 ( [動] 擺放、擺列、儲、儲藏；[名] 產卵、沉澱、沉積、儲藏 )
deposit.sentence_en: a deposit of seaweed on the shore

description.translation: 描述 ( [名] 描述、描寫、色 )
description.sentence_en: The zoo had no lions, tigers, or cats of any description.
description.sentence_zh: 動物園裡沒有獅子、老虎或任何類型的貓。

despite.translation: 儘管 ( [介] 頂、儘管、任憑、雖 )

destination.translation: 目的地 ( [名] 地頭、目標地址、目的地、終點 )

destruction.translation: 破壞 ( [名] 拆除、拆燬、拆開、拆散 )
destruction.sentence_en: The destruction of the condemned building will take place at noon.
destruction.sentence_zh: 這座被譴責的建築將於中午時分被摧毀。

detailed.translation: 詳細的 ( [形] 廣博的、縷、細、細密 )
detailed.sentence_en: I'll detail the exact procedure to you later.
detailed.sentence_zh: 稍後我會向您詳細介紹具體流程。

developer.translation: 開發商 ( [名] 開發人員 )

device.translation: 裝置 ( [名] 電器、具、謨、設備 )
device.sentence_en: There are a number of household devices in a kitchen such as a dishwasher, a garbage disposal, or an electric can opener.
device.sentence_zh: 廚房裡有許多家用設備，例如洗碗機、垃圾處理器或電動開罐器。

digital.translation: 數位的 ( [形] 手指的、數據、數位、數字；[名] 指 )
digital.sentence_en: He moved to digital for the first time, using a Sony camera.
digital.sentence_zh: 他第一次轉向數位相機，使用Sony相機。

diligent.translation: 勤奮 ( [形] 勤、勤奮、勤謹、勤苦 )
diligent.sentence_en: Scientists are very diligent in their work.
diligent.sentence_zh: 科學家們非常勤奮地工作。

diploma.translation: 文憑 ( [名] 畢業証書、文憑；[動] 發給 ... 畢業証書 )

diplomacy.translation: 外交 ( [名] 外交、外交手腕 )
diplomacy.sentence_en: National diplomacy typically deploys its dexterity to secure advantage for one's nation.
diplomacy.sentence_zh: 國家外交通常會運用其靈活性來確保國家的優勢。

director.translation: 導演 ( [名] 導演、董、董事、經理 )

disagree.translation: 不同意 ( [動] 不適宜、不同意 )
disagree.sentence_en: Bob says cats are friendlier than dogs, but I disagree.
disagree.sentence_zh: 鮑伯說貓比狗更友好，但我不同意。

disappear.translation: 消失 ( [動] 冰釋、不見了、遁、沒 )

discount.translation: 折扣 ( [動] 打折扣、貼現、折；[名] 扣、扣頭、貼息、貼現 )
discount.sentence_en: This store offers discounts on all its wares. That store specializes in discount wares, too.
discount.sentence_zh: 這家商店的所有商品均提供折扣。那家商店也專門販售折扣商品。

dismiss.translation: 解僱 ( [動] 罷、罷黜、罷官、罷職 )
dismiss.sentence_en: The company dismissed me after less than a year.
dismiss.sentence_zh: 不到一年，公司就解雇了我。

dispatch.translation: 派遣 ( [動] 差遣、打發、調度、調遣；[名] 電訊、牒、特派、誅僇 )
dispatch.sentence_en: We must act with dispatch in this matter.
dispatch.sentence_zh: 在這件事上我們必須迅速採取行動。

distribute.translation: 散佈 ( [動] 播散、發表、發佈、發行 )
distribute.sentence_en: He distributed the bread amongst his followers.
distribute.sentence_zh: 他將麵包分發給他的追隨者。

distribution.translation: 分配 ( [名] 布點、布局、分發、分配 )
distribution.sentence_en: The distribution of my little rock magazine is about 3,000.
distribution.sentence_zh: 我的小搖滾雜誌發行量大約有3000份。

district.translation: 區 ( [名] 地域、管區、區、區域 )

distrust.translation: 懷疑 ( [動] 不信用、懷疑；[名] 懷疑、疑問、疑心 )

diverse.translation: 各種各樣的 ( [形] 多種、繁雜、各色各樣、異 )
diverse.sentence_en: Idris Elba was a diverse hire for the franchise
diverse.sentence_zh: 伊德里斯艾爾巴 (Idris Elba) 是該系列的多元化員工

division.translation: 分配 ( [名] 部、部類、部門、疇 )
division.sentence_en: I've got ten divisions to do for my homework.
division.sentence_zh: 我有十個部門的作業要做。

do.translation: 做 ( [動] 辦、操、從事、胹；[名] 欺詐、使為難 )
do.sentence_en: We’re having a bit of a do on Saturday to celebrate my birthday.
do.sentence_zh: 週六我們會做一些事情來慶祝我的生日。

domestic.translation: 國內的 ( [形] 國內、家庭的；[名] 仆人 )
domestic.sentence_en: 2005: Bellingham-Whatcom County Commission Against Domestic Violence, Domestic Violence in Whatcom County (read on the Whatcom County website athttps//web.archive.org/web/20060618212243/http://www.co.whatcom.wa.us/boards/dv_whatcom042505.pdf on 20 May 2006) - The number of “verbal domestics” (where law enforcement determines that no assault has occurred and where no arrest is made), decreased significantly.
domestic.sentence_zh: 2005 年：貝靈厄姆-霍特科姆縣反家庭暴力委員會，霍特科姆縣的家庭暴力（請參閱霍特科姆縣網站 https://web.archive.org/web/20060618212243/http://www.co.whatcom.wa.us/boards/dv_whatcom042505.pdf 「言語家庭暴力」的數量（其中法律執法部門確定沒有發生攻擊事件，也沒有逮捕任何人），顯著減少。

dominate.translation: 支配 ( [動] 把持、霸、稱霸、控制 )
dominate.sentence_en: The dominant party controlled the government.

drag.translation: 拖 ( [名] 掎、拖拉、拖累；[動] 掎、揪、拉、牽引 )
drag.sentence_en: When designing cars, manufacturers have to take drag into consideration.
drag.sentence_zh: 在設計汽車時，製造商必須考慮阻力。

dramatic.translation: 戲劇性 ( [形] 戲劇性、有聲有色 )

durable.translation: 耐用的 ( [形] 結實、經久、牢、耐久 )

earnest.translation: 認真 ( [形] 惻惻、篤、懇、懇切；[名] 誠摯、定金、認真 )

electric.sentence_en: We had to sit in the dark because the electric was cut off.
electric.sentence_zh: 由於電源被切斷，我們不得不坐在黑暗中。

elevate.translation: 提升 ( [形] 舉起的；[動] 鼓舞、提升、興建 )
elevate.sentence_en: The doctor told me elevating my legs would help reduce the swelling.
elevate.sentence_zh: 醫生告訴我抬高雙腿可以幫助減輕腫脹。

embassy.translation: 大使館 ( [名] 大使館、館、使館 )
embassy.sentence_en: The American embassy to France is located in Paris.
embassy.sentence_zh: 美國駐法國大使館位於巴黎。

emerge.translation: 出現 ( [動] 產生、呈現、出來、出現 )
emerge.sentence_en: He emerged unscathed from the accident.

emotional.translation: 情緒化的 ( [形] 感情的、鼓舞的、情緒化 )

emphasis.sentence_en: He paused for emphasis before saying who had won.
emphasis.sentence_zh: 在說出誰贏了之前，他停頓了一下以強調這一點。

emphasize.translation: 強調 ( [動] 強調、硬說、注重 )
emphasize.sentence_en: His two-fingered gesture emphasized what he had told his boss to do with his job.
emphasize.sentence_zh: 他的兩個手指的手勢強調了他告訴老闆如何處理他的工作。

employment.translation: 就業 ( [名] 采取、僱用、業 )
employment.sentence_en: The personnel director handled the whole employment procedure
employment.sentence_zh: 人事總監辦理整個聘用手續

enable.translation: 使能夠 ( [動] 俾、使 ... 能夠 )
enable.sentence_en: April 16, 2018, Norimitsu Onishi and Selam Gebrekidan writing in The New York Times, ‘They Eat Money’: How Mandela’s Political Heirs Grow Rich Off Corruption
enable.sentence_zh: 2018 年 4 月 16 日，Norimitsu Onishi 和 Selam Gebrekidan 在《紐約時報》上發表文章「他們吃錢」：曼德拉的政治繼承人如何透過腐敗致富

enclose.translation: 括 ( [動] 放入封套、封入、附寄、附上 )

enclosure.translation: 外殼 ( [名] 附件、圍牆、閑 )
enclosure.sentence_en: There was an enclosure with the letter — a photo.
enclosure.sentence_zh: 裡面有一封信，裡面有一張照片。

engagement.translation: 訂婚 ( [名] 訂婚、定親、婚約、決戰 )
engagement.sentence_en: The lecturer has three speaking engagements this week.

enroll.translation: 註冊 ( [動] 錄取、吸收、招收、注冊 )
enroll.sentence_en: They were eager to enroll new recruits.

enthusiasm.translation: 熱情 ( [名] 激情、熱忱、熱情、熱心 )

entitled.sentence_en: A passport entitles the bearer to travel to other countries.
entitled.sentence_zh: 護照使持有人有權前往其他國家。

entity.sentence_en: The group successfully maintains its tribal entity.
entity.sentence_zh: 該團體成功地維持了其部落實體。

entrance.translation: 入口 ( [動] 使狂喜；[名] 大門、進口、入口、輸入 )
entrance.sentence_en: Her entrance attracted no attention whatsoever.
entrance.sentence_zh: 她的出現並沒有引起任何注意。

establish.translation: 建立 ( [動] 成立、創辦、創建、創立 )

establishment.translation: 設立 ( [名] 編製、承認為國教、館、豎 )
establishment.sentence_en: Since their establishment of the company in 1984, they have grown into a global business.
establishment.sentence_zh: 自 1984 年成立以來，他們已發展成為全球性企業。

estate.translation: 財產 ( [名] 產業、地產、房產、房地產 )

estimate.translation: 估計 ( [名] 揆、量、預算；[動] 測度、揣、揣度、估 )

ethical.translation: 道德的 ( [形] 合乎道德的、合乎正道的 )
ethical.sentence_en: The philosopher Kant is particularly known for his ethical writings.
ethical.sentence_zh: 哲學家康德以其倫理著作而聞名。

exaggerate.translation: 誇大 ( [動] 侈、浮誇、誇、誇大 )
exaggerate.sentence_en: He said he'd slept with hundreds of girls, but I know he's exaggerating. The real number is about ten.
exaggerate.sentence_zh: 他說他睡過數百個女孩，但我知道他有點誇張。真實數量大約是十個。

exaggeration.translation: 誇張 ( [名] 僵化、誇大、誇張、鋪張 )

exceed.translation: 超過 ( [動] 超、超出、超過、超過限度 )
exceed.sentence_en: The company's 2005 revenue exceeds that of 2004.

exception.translation: 例外 ( [名] 不贊成、不贊同、反駁、例外 )
exception.sentence_en: That rule is usually true, but there are a few exceptions.
exception.sentence_zh: 這個規則通常是正確的，但也有一些例外。

excess.translation: 過量的 ( [形] 多余的、過剩的、剩余的、忒；[動] 過度；[名] 過分、過量、過剩、贏余 )
excess.sentence_en: The excess of heavy water was given away to the neighbouring country.

aggregate.translation: 總計的 ( [名] 骨料、合計；[形] 合計的；[動] 並集、合計 )

appraise.translation: 評價 ( [動] 褒貶、揣度、估、估計 )

assemble.translation: 集合 ( [動] 湊合、攢、萃、萃集 )

assignment.sentence_zh: 此流程圖代表了我們委員會的任務分配。

assistance.translation: 協助 ( [名] 幫助、促成、促進、濟 )

association.translation: 協會 ( [名] 黨、瓜葛、合伙、合夥 )

attain.translation: 達到 ( [動] 達、達到、高達、嬴 )

barter.sentence_en: We had no money so we had to live by barter.
barter.sentence_zh: 我們沒有錢，只能靠物物交換維生。

binding.sentence_en: Just to make the cheese more binding

bond.translation: 紐帶 ( [名] 牢蘢、縲、粘著、鈕帶；[動] 縲、粘著、紐帶 )
bond.sentence_en: Investors face a quandary. Cash offers a return of virtually zero in many developed countries; government-bond yields may have risen in recent weeks but they are still unattractive. Equities have suffered two big bear markets since 2000 and are wobbling again. It is hardly surprising that pension funds, insurers and endowments are searching for new sources of return.

innovation.sentence_en: The others, whose time had been more actively employed, began to shew symptoms of innovation,—"the good wine did its good office." The frost of etiquette, and pride of birth, began to give way before the genial blessings of this benign constellation, and the formal appellatives with which the three dignitaries had hitherto addressed each other, were now familiarly abbreviated into Tully, Bally, and Killie.
innovation.sentence_zh: 其他人的時間得到了更積極的利用，開始表現出創新的跡象——「好酒發揮了它的作用。」在這個仁慈的星座的親切祝福面前，禮儀的嚴酷和出身的驕傲開始消失，三位貴賓迄今為止互相稱呼的正式稱呼現在被人們熟悉地縮寫為塔利、巴利和基利。

insignificant.translation: 微不足道 ( [形] 稗、渺、謏、瑣細 )

coalition.sentence_zh: 2010年，自由民主黨和保守黨組成聯合政府。

comparatively.translation: 比較 ( [副] 比較、較、相對 )

concoct.translation: 編造 ( [動] 編造、捏造、炮、瞎造 )

concur.translation: 同意 ( [動] 合作、同時發生、同意、贊成 )

conjure.sentence_en: He started conjuring at the age of 15, and is now a famous stage magician.

conspire.translation: 合謀 ( [動] 串、搞陰謀、共謀、合謀 )

constrain.translation: 約束 ( [動] 逼、逼勒、逼迫、拘束 )

construe.translation: 解釋 ( [動] 講解、臆測、直譯 )
construe.sentence_en: The world must construe according to its wits; this court must construe according to the law.

continuity.sentence_zh: 閱讀德國哲學需要相當連續的注意力。

contractor.translation: 承包商 ( [名] 包工、承包人、承包商 )

contrive.translation: 設法 ( [動] 發明、發現、諆、圖謀 )

converge.translation: 收斂 ( [動] 輳、合流、匯、匯合 )

conversant.sentence_en: She is equally conversant with Shakespeare and the laws of physics.
conversant.sentence_zh: 她同樣熟悉莎士比亞和物理定律。

cope.translation: 應付 ( [動] 對付、對抗、鋪蓋、轄制；[名] 覆蓋 )

courier.sentence_en: We'll have the contract couriered to you.

cozy.translation: 舒適 ( [形] 合身的、舒適 )

obsolete.translation: 過時的 ( [動] 廢語；[形] 陳舊、廢棄的、過時的 )
obsolete.sentence_en: It is speculated that, within a few years, the Internet's speedy delivery of news worldwide will make newspapers obsolete.
obsolete.sentence_zh: 據推測，幾年之內，互聯網在全球範圍內快速傳播新聞將使報紙變得過時。

obstinate.translation: 頑固 ( [形] 愎、固執、硜、硻 )

occupied.sentence_en: The stall on the left is occupied.

occurrence.translation: 發生 ( [名] 發生、蘊、蘊蓄 )

offensive.translation: 進攻 ( [名] 攻勢、進攻、冒犯者；[形] 唐、有攻擊性 )
offensive.sentence_en: The Marines today launched a major offensive.
offensive.sentence_zh: 海軍陸戰隊今天發動了大規模攻擊。

offering.translation: 奉獻 ( [形] 奉現；[名] 供、捐助、饗 )
offering.sentence_en: She offered to help with her homework.
offering.sentence_zh: 她主動提出幫她做作業。

omission.sentence_en: The suspicious omissions in the new edition of the book attracted claims of censorship.
omission.sentence_zh: 新版書中的可疑遺漏引起了審查制度的指控。

one.sentence_en: I knew as soon I met him that John was the one for me and we were married within a month.
one.sentence_zh: 我一見到他就知道約翰是我的最愛，我們在一個月內就結婚了。

onus.sentence_en: The onus is on the landlord to make sure the walls are protected from mildew.
onus.sentence_zh: 房東有責任確保牆壁免受黴變。

onward.translation: 向前 ( [副] 前進、往前、向前；[形] 前進的 )
onward.sentence_en: There was an onward rush as the gates opened.
onward.sentence_zh: 當大門打開時，人們湧入。

opaque.translation: 不透明 ( [形] 不透明、瓀 )

operational.translation: 操作 ( [形] 操作、當前的、工作的、目前的 )

operative.sentence_en: He's usually in a good mood — the operative word there being "usually". Today was a disaster.
operative.sentence_zh: 他通常心情很好——關鍵字就是「通常」。今天是一場災難。

opportune.translation: 適時的 ( [形] 按時的、合適的、及時的、適時的 )
opportune.sentence_en: This would be an opportune spot for a picnic.

opportunity.translation: 機會 ( [名] 會、機、機會、機遇 )
opportunity.sentence_en: The world is full of opportunities and it's up to me to see them and pursue them.
opportunity.sentence_zh: 世界充滿了機會，就看我去發現它們並去追求它們​​。

opposite.translation: 對面的 ( [副] 對過、對面；[形] 對立的、對面的、和 ... 不同、逆；[名] 對立面、對立物、對面；[介] 嚮、在 ... 對面 )

optimistic.translation: 樂觀的 ( [形] 開朗的、樂觀的、樂天的 )

optional.translation: 選修的 ( [形] 選修的、自選的 )
optional.sentence_en: On that beach clothing is entirely optional.
optional.sentence_zh: 在海灘上，衣服是完全可選的。

orderly.translation: 秩序 ( [副] 不錯、對、整、正确；[形] 楚、井、利落、有板有眼；[名] 勤務兵 )
orderly.sentence_en: He has always kept an orderly kitchen, with nothing out of place.
orderly.sentence_zh: 他的廚房一直保持著井然有序，沒有任何亂七八糟的地方。

ordinarily.translation: 按說 ( [副] 按理、按說、平常 )
ordinarily.sentence_en: Ordinarily I go to the match on a Saturday.
ordinarily.sentence_zh: 通常我會在星期六去看比賽。

organic.translation: 有機的 ( [形] 機、器質性、有機 )
organic.sentence_en: The writing of the script was an organic process.
organic.sentence_zh: 劇本的寫作是一個有機的過程。

organization.translation: 組織 ( [名] 公家、機構、體制、團 )
organization.sentence_en: This painting shows little organization at first glance, but little by little the structure becomes clear.
organization.sentence_zh: 這幅畫乍看之下沒有什麼組織，但漸漸地結構就清晰了。

orient.sentence_en: The workers oriented all the signs to face the road.
orient.sentence_zh: 工人們將所有標誌牌都面對道路。

orientation.translation: 方向 ( [名] 方嚮、方針、取嚮、嚮 )
orientation.sentence_en: The homing instinct in pigeons is an example of orientation.
orientation.sentence_zh: 鴿子的歸巢本能就是定向的一個例子。

originally.translation: 起初 ( [副] 本來、當初、起初、起頭 )
originally.sentence_en: Originally, this paper was white, but over the years it has yellowed with age.
originally.sentence_zh: 這張紙原本是白色的，但隨著時間的推移，它已經泛黃了。

originate.translation: 起源 ( [動] 創立、導源、發動、發明 )
originate.sentence_en: The scheme originated with the governor and council.
originate.sentence_zh: 該計劃最初由州長和議會發起。

orthodox.translation: 正統 ( [形] 保守的、慣常的；[名] 正統 )

outcome.translation: 結果 ( [名] 產物、結果、鬆 )
outcome.sentence_en: A quality automobile is the outcome of the work of skilled engineers and thousands of workers.
outcome.sentence_zh: 高品質的汽車是熟練工程師和數千名工人工作的成果。

outdoor.translation: 戶外的 ( [形] 戶外、室外 )

outer.translation: 外 ( [名] 打倒；[形] 外、以外、在外 )

outgoing.translation: 外向的 ( [形] 出的、去的 )
outgoing.sentence_en: Tom is very outgoing and enjoys meeting people; his brother, on the other hand, is painfully shy.
outgoing.sentence_zh: 湯姆非常外向，喜歡認識朋友；另一方面，他的兄弟卻非常害羞。

outlaw.translation: 取締 ( [名] 暴客、流亡者、無法無天；[動] 取締 )
outlaw.sentence_en: The main character in the play was a bit of an outlaw who refused to shake hands or say thank you.
outlaw.sentence_zh: 劇中的主角有點不法之徒，拒絕握手或說謝謝。

outlet.translation: 出路 ( [名] 插座、出口、出路、發洩的方法；[動] 放出、放下 )

output.translation: 輸出 ( [名] 產出、產量、產品、出產；[動] 出產、生產、制造 )
output.sentence_en: The factory increased its output this year.

outrageous.translation: 令人髮指的 ( [形] 不像話、蠻橫的 )

outright.translation: 徹底的 ( [副] 公開地、公然、坦白地；[形] 純屬、爽快、直率的 )

outset.translation: 一開始 ( [名] 出發、發端、起點 )
outset.sentence_en: He agreed and understood from the outset, so don't bother explaining again.
outset.sentence_zh: 他一開始就答應了，也明白了，所以不用再解釋了。

outsider.translation: 局外人 ( [名] 局外人、門外漢、外人 )
outsider.sentence_en: While the initiated easily understand the symbols, they are wholly inaccessible to outsiders.
outsider.sentence_zh: 雖然入門者很容易理解這些符號，但外人卻完全無法理解它們。

outstanding.translation: 傑出的 ( [形] 不同凡響、出色、杰、傑 )

outward.translation: 向外 ( [形] 表面的、外、外部的、外面的；[副] 朝外、從外面、往外、嚮外；[名] 外表、外觀、外貌 )
outward.sentence_en: By all outward indications, he's a normal happy child, but if you talk to him, you will soon realize he has some psychological problems.
outward.sentence_zh: 從所有外表來看，他是一個正常快樂的孩子，但如果你和他交談，你很快就會意識到他有一些心理問題。

overcome.translation: 克服 ( [動] 攻下、克、克服、馴 )

overdue.sentence_en: his library books were three days overdue;  my car is overdue for an oil change;  she finally left on a long overdue vacation
overdue.sentence_zh: 他圖書館的書逾期三天了；  我的車逾期更換機油；  她終於去度了一個姍姍來遲的假期

overflow.translation: 溢出 ( [名] 泛濫、濫、漫；[動] 涔、氾、氾濫、泛濫 )

overhear.sentence_en: I was hanging clothes in the garden and I overheard the neighbours talking about Sheila's pregnancy.
overhear.sentence_zh: 我正在花園裡晾衣服，無意中聽到鄰居們談論希拉懷孕的事。

overlap.translation: 重疊 ( [名] 飛邊、交疊；[動] 套 )
overlap.sentence_en: The mouse-mat overlapped the edge of the desk.
overlap.sentence_zh: 滑鼠墊與桌子的邊緣重疊。

overlook.translation: 俯瞰 ( [名] 漠視；[動] 俯瞰、俯視、高聳、忽略 )
overlook.sentence_en: Our hotel room overlooks the lake.
overlook.sentence_zh: 我們的飯店房間可以俯瞰湖景。

overnight.translation: 過夜 ( [形] 前夜的；[動] 過夜、宿夜；[名] 前晚；[副] 通宵 )
overnight.sentence_en: Have you looked at the overnights yet?

oversee.translation: 監督 ( [動] 督、監、監視、監工 )
oversee.sentence_en: It is congress's duty to oversee the spending of federal funds.
oversee.sentence_zh: 監督聯邦資金的支出是國會的職責。

overt.translation: 公開 ( [形] 公開、明顯的、陽 )

overtime.translation: 隨著時間的推移 ( [形] 超時的、加班的；[名] 加時；[副] 超時地、加班地；[動] 使 ... 感光過久 )
overtime.sentence_en: Workers are usually paid extra for working overtime.
overtime.sentence_zh: 工人通常會因加班而獲得額外報酬。

overturn.translation: 顛覆 ( [名] 翻覆、翻轉；[動] 顛覆、翻、翻倒、翻過來 )

overwork.translation: 過度勞累 ( [名] 過度操勞、過度工作；[動] 工作過度 )

paradigm.sentence_en: Thomas Kuhn's landmark “The Structure of Scientific Revolutions” got people talking about paradigm shifts, to the point the word itself now suggests an incomplete or biased perspective.
paradigm.sentence_zh: 托馬斯·庫恩的里程碑式的《科學革命的結構》讓人們開始談論範式轉變，以至於這個詞本身現在暗示著一種不完整或有偏見的觀點。

parameter.sentence_en: Roughly, a tuple of arguments could be thought of as a vector, whereas a tuple of parameters could be thought of as a covector (i.e., linear functional). When a function is called, a parameter tuple becomes "bound" to an argument tuple, allowing the function instance itself to be computed to yield a return value. This would be roughly analogous to applying a covector to a vector (by taking their dot product (or, rather, matrix-product of row vector and column vector)) to obtain a scalar.
parameter.sentence_zh: 粗略地說，參數元組可以被視為向量，而參數元組可以被視為協向量（即線性函數）。當呼叫函數時，參數元組「綁定」到參數元組，從而允許計算函數實例本身以產生返回值。這大致類似於將協向量應用於向量（透過取它們的點積（或更確切地說，行向量和列向量的矩陣積））來獲得標量。

paramount.translation: 派拉蒙 ( [形] 高級的、首要的、至高的、最高的 )
paramount.sentence_en: Getting those credit cards paid off is paramount.
paramount.sentence_zh: 還清這些信用卡是至關重要的。

parliament.translation: 議會 ( [名] 國會、議會、議院 )
parliament.sentence_en: Following the general election, Jane Doe took her oath of office as a member of the nation's fifth parliament.
parliament.sentence_zh: 大選後，簡·多伊宣誓就任美國第五屆國會議員。

partition.translation: 分割 ( [動] 分、隔、劃分；[名] 分拆、隔、隔開、隔离物 )
partition.sentence_en: Monarchies where partition isn't prohibited risk weakening trough parcellation and civil wars between the heirs
partition.sentence_zh: 不禁止分治的君主制國家可能會因分割和繼承人之間的內戰而被削弱

patronage.sentence_en: His vigorous patronage of the conservatives got him in trouble with progressives.
patronage.sentence_zh: 他對保守派的大力贊助使他與進步派陷入了麻煩。

pending.translation: 待辦的 ( [介] 當 ... 的時候、在 ... 期間；[形] 聽候、未決定、有待 )
pending.sentence_en: Pending the outcome of the investigation, the police officer is suspended from duty.
pending.sentence_zh: 在調查結果出來之前，該名警官已被停職。

perception.translation: 洞察力 ( [名] 感覺、知覺 )

perceptive.translation: 敏銳的 ( [形] 感覺靈敏的、感知的、精明、知覺的 )
perceptive.sentence_en: He is so perceptive when it comes to other people's feelings.
perceptive.sentence_zh: 當談到別人的感受時，他非常敏銳。

permeate.translation: 滲透 ( [動] 沉浸、貫串、彌漫、滲入 )

permission.sentence_en: Sire, do I have your permission to execute this traitor?
permission.sentence_zh: 陛下，您允許我處決這個叛徒嗎？

perpetual.translation: 永久 ( [形] 永、永恆、永久 )
perpetual.sentence_en: By means of artificial hybridization, practised for a series of years, he has succeeded in producing a race of carnations which are perpetual bloomers.
perpetual.sentence_zh: 透過多年的人工雜交，他成功地培育了一個永遠開花的康乃馨品種。

pertinent.translation: 相關的 ( [形] 貼題、應用 )

pipeline.translation: 管道 ( [名] 管道、傳遞途徑；[動] 傳遞途徑 )
pipeline.sentence_en: An oil pipeline has been opened from the Caspian Sea.
pipeline.sentence_zh: 里海的石油管道已經開通。

plumber.translation: 水管工 ( [名] 管子工、水管工人 )

populate.sentence_en: Clicking the refresh button will populate the grid.
populate.sentence_zh: 點擊刷新按鈕將填滿網格。

portfolio.translation: 資料夾 ( [名] 部長職務、皮包、篋 )
portfolio.sentence_en: I would like to introduce you to our portfolio of services.
portfolio.sentence_zh: 我想向您介紹我們的服務組合。

postal.translation: 郵政 ( [名] 明信片；[形] 郵、郵政 )
postal.sentence_zh: 滿足您所有的郵政需求

postulate.translation: 假定 ( [名] 公設、臆測；[動] 假定、要求 )

precaution.translation: 預防 ( [名] 預防、預防措施 )
precaution.sentence_en: his life was saved by precaution
precaution.sentence_zh: 預防措施挽救了他的生命

precedent.translation: 先例 ( [名] 例、前例、先例；[形] 前述的 )

precision.translation: 精確 ( [名] 精確、縝、縝密 )

preclude.sentence_en: It has been raining for days, but that doesn’t preclude the possibility that the skies will clear by this afternoon!
preclude.sentence_zh: 雖然已經下了幾天的雨，但不排除今天下午天空會放晴的可能性！

precondition.translation: 前提 ( [名] 前提、事先具備條件 )
precondition.sentence_en: A marriage licence is a precondition for a wedding.
precondition.sentence_zh: 結婚證書是舉行婚禮的先決條件。

predecessor.translation: 前任 ( [名] 前任、前任者 )

premier.translation: 總理 ( [形] 首位的、最初的；[名] 主席、總理 )
premier.sentence_en: The composer invited all his friends when they premiered the movie he orchestrated, we got to see it before anyone but the crew.
premier.sentence_zh: 作曲家在首映他精心編排的電影時邀請了他所有的朋友，我們在除了工作人員之外的任何人之前看到了它。

prerogative.translation: 特權 ( [名] 特權；[形] 特權的 )

presently.translation: 目前 ( [副] 隨即、一會兒 )

preside.translation: 主持 ( [動] 任主席、主持 )

prestige.translation: 聲望 ( [名] 面子、聲光、聲望、聲威 )
prestige.sentence_en: Oxford has a university of very high prestige.
prestige.sentence_zh: 牛津擁有一所享有很高聲譽的大學。

pretentious.translation: 自命不凡的 ( [形] 過於盛大的 )
pretentious.sentence_en: Her dress was obviously more pretentious than comfortable.
pretentious.sentence_zh: 她的穿著顯然比舒適更做作。

procurement.sentence_en: He was responsible for the procurement of materials and supplies.
procurement.sentence_zh: 他負責材料和供應品的採購。

proficiency.sentence_en: a test of proficiency in English

profusion.sentence_en: His hair, in great profusion, streamed down over his shoulders.
profusion.sentence_zh: 他的頭髮非常茂密，披散在肩膀上。

prolong.translation: 延長 ( [動] 拉長、拖延、續、延 )
prolong.sentence_en: The government shouldn't prolong deciding on this issue any further.
prolong.sentence_zh: 政府不應再拖延對此問題的決定。

promotion.translation: 晉升 ( [名] 豐富、升遷、提升、養殖 )
promotion.sentence_en: I'll have to give myself a promotion!

promotional.sentence_en: Collect five promotional vouchers to claim your prize.
promotional.sentence_zh: 收集五張促銷券即可領取獎品。

propensity.sentence_en: He has a propensity for lengthy discussions of certain favorite topics.
propensity.sentence_zh: 他有對某些喜歡的話題進行長時間討論的傾向。

proposition.translation: 主張 ( [動] 向 ... 提議；[名] 意、議案、意味、主張 )
proposition.sentence_en: “'Wiktionary is a good dictionary' is a proposition” is a proposition.
proposition.sentence_zh: 「『維基字典是好字典』是一個命題」是一個命題。

prosecute.sentence_en: to prosecute a man for trespass, or for a riot
prosecute.sentence_zh: 起訴某人非法侵入或騷亂

protocol.translation: 協定 ( [名] 草約、禮節、禮儀、協定 )

prototype.translation: 原型 ( [名] 榜樣、樣板、樣機、原型 )
prototype.sentence_en: The prototype had loose wires and rough edges, but it worked.
prototype.sentence_zh: 原型機的電線鬆動，邊緣粗糙，但它可以工作。

provocative.translation: 挑釁 ( [名] 刺激物、興奮劑；[形] 氣人的、挑舋 )

provoke.translation: 惹 ( [動] 刺激、搦、惹、使憤怒 )
provoke.sentence_en: Don't provoke the dog; it may try to bite you.
provoke.sentence_zh: 不要激怒狗；它可能會試圖咬你。

proximity.sentence_en: The proximity of the heat source allowed it to be detected by the sensor.
proximity.sentence_zh: 熱源的接近使得感測器能夠檢測到它。

rattle.translation: 撥浪鼓 ( [名] 霸王鞭、嘎嘎聲、響環；[動] 發嘎嘎聲 )
rattle.sentence_en: I wish they would fix the rattle under my dashboard.
rattle.sentence_zh: 我希望他們能修復我儀表板下的嘎嘎聲。

realm.translation: 領域 ( [名] 境界、領域、王國 )

rebellion.translation: 叛亂 ( [名] 暴動、暴亂、變、謀反 )
rebellion.sentence_en: The government is doing its best to stop rebellion in the country.
rebellion.sentence_zh: 政府正在盡最大努力製止該國的叛亂。

reboot.sentence_en: The system reboots every weekend after updates are installed.
reboot.sentence_zh: 安裝更新後，系統每個週末都會重新啟動。

rebound.translation: 反彈 ( [形] 重梱的；[動] 復興、復原、彈回；[名] 籃板球 )

recant.sentence_en: Convince me that I am wrong, and I will recant.
recant.sentence_zh: 說服我我錯了，我就會放棄。

recession.translation: 經濟衰退 ( [名] 不景氣、后退 )

recipe.translation: 食譜 ( [名] 方劑、烹飪法、食譜 )
recipe.sentence_en: His new approach is definitely a recipe for success.
recipe.sentence_zh: 他的新方法絕對是成功的秘訣。

recipient.translation: 接受者 ( [形] 感受性強的；[名] 接受者、受者 )
recipient.sentence_en: My e-mail never reached the intended recipient.
recipient.sentence_zh: 我的電子郵件從未到達預定收件者。

reciprocal.translation: 互惠的 ( [形] 彼此相反的、倒數、倒易、互惠；[名] 倒數 )

reckless.translation: 魯莽 ( [形] 不顧一切、倀、愣頭愣腦、魯莽 )

reconcile.translation: 調和 ( [動] 和好、和解、排解、說 )
reconcile.sentence_en: to reconcile people who have quarrelled

recruit.translation: 招募 ( [名] 復原、新兵；[動] 錄取、募、收錄、吸收 )
recruit.sentence_en: These new recruits were hired after passing the interviews
recruit.sentence_zh: 這些新進員工通過面試後被錄用

rectangle.translation: 長方形 ( [名] 長方形、矩形 )

redundant.translation: 多餘的 ( [形] 過多的、過剩的、冗、忒 )

refuge.translation: 避難所 ( [名] 避難所、逋逃藪、隱藏處 )

refute.translation: 反駁 ( [動] 辯駁、駮、駁斥、駁倒 )

regiment.translation: 團 ( [名] 一群、一團；[動] 編成團 )

regress.translation: 回歸 ( [動] 復原、回歸、退步；[名] 回歸 )
regress.sentence_en: When we regress Y on X, we use the values of variable X to predict those of Y.
